title: Sickness & Sick Leave
description: This category explains common Polish sick-leave and ZUS sickness-benefit concepts. It helps you recognize terms such as e-ZLA, ZAS-53, Z-10, Z-3, ZNp-7, OL-9, and świadczenie rehabilitacyjne, and shows where the official ZUS and gov.pl pages describe each situation.
owns: the difference between employer-paid sick pay and ZUS sickness benefit
why sick leave works differently under B2B and self-employment
e-ZLA electronic sick notes at a general level
sickness benefit concepts, including after insurance has ended
common ZUS forms mentioned in sickness situations
doesNotOwn: deciding whether you qualify for a benefit
